name: Patient Case
history: Ongoing interpersonal difficulties involving a partner named Ivan and his family. Recent trust and betrayal issues involving Ivan. Ongoing contact with Ivan's family.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't forgive, I will lose my relationship with Ivan.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't trust anyone, and I will always be hurt.
coping_strategies: Avoid confrontation and suppress feelings to maintain peace.
situation: During an interaction with Ivan's family, the mother says 'boys will be boys' and asks the patient to 'forgive and forget'.
auto_thought: I have to forgive Ivan, or I will be alone.
behavior: Reluctantly agrees to forgive Ivan, suppressing personal feelings.
